minecraft.title: Project Minecraft
minecraft.desc: A production-ready Minecraft Java server packaged with Docker & Compose. Persistent worlds, env-based config, and simple testing.

conduit.title: Conduit
conduit.desc: RealWorld Conduit clone showcasing API, auth, CI/CD and DevSecOps hardening.

truck.title: Truck Signs API
truck.desc: REST API for truck signage data (CRUD, auth, tests), containerized deploy.

juice.title: OWASP Juice Shop Master
juice.desc: Deliberately insecure app used to practice finding and fixing vulnerabilities.

baby.title: Baby Tools Shop
baby.desc: Simple e-commerce demo with Dockerized runtime and CI pipelines.

wordpress.title: WordPress hosting
wordpress.desc: WordPress on Docker/Compose with persistent volumes and env-driven config.

vserver.title: V-Server Setup
vserver.desc: Containerized server setup: reverse proxy, TLS, and compose orchestration.

firstCard.title: 1. Minecraft
firstCard.desc: A production-ready Minecraft Java server packaged with Docker & Compose. Persistent worlds, env-based config, and simple testing—my first cloud build from the DevSecOps course, made reliable and repeatable.

secondCard.title: 2. Clone (Container)
secondCard.desc: A lightweight app clone running in Docker. Multi-stage build, Docker Compose, and env-based config—fast spins, reproducible deploys, and simple health checks.

thirdCard.title: 3. WordPress hosting
thirdCard.desc: WordPress on Docker/Compose. Persistent volumes for DB and uploads, .env-driven config, and hassle-free updates without data loss.
